subject: Slack integration not syncing
message:
Hi TaskFlow team,

I've connected our Slack workspace to TaskFlow, but notifications aren't coming through. I've checked the integration settings and everything looks connected. Our team really relies on Slack notifications to stay updated on task changes.

Could you help me troubleshoot this?

Thanks,
Sarah
Hey! Quick q - how do I set up recurring tasks? Need weekly standup reminders

subject: Billing issue - charged twice
message: I was charged twice for our Business plan subscription this month. I see two charges of $288 on my credit card statement. Please refund the duplicate charge immediately. This is unacceptable.

subject: Enterprise pricing inquiry
message:
Hello,

We're a consulting firm with 150 employees looking to migrate from our current project management tool to TaskFlow. We need:

- SSO integration with Okta
- Custom SLA with 1-hour response time
- Dedicated account manager
- Data migration assistance

Could you provide enterprise pricing and schedule a demo?

Best regards,
David Kim
CTO, Acme Consulting
The mobile app keeps crashing when I try to upload photos!! So frustrating 😤

subject: How to export project data?
message:
Hi,

I need to export all tasks from our Q4 Marketing Campaign project to share with our client. I see the CSV export option in List view, but it only exports visible columns. How can I export all task details including comments and attachments?

Thanks!

subject: Google Calendar sync delayed
message: The Google Calendar integration is syncing very slowly. Tasks I create in TaskFlow take 30+ minutes to appear in my calendar. Is this normal? The docs say it syncs every 15 minutes.
Love the new timeline view! 🎉 One question - can I change the color coding from priority to project?

subject: Account access issue
message:
Hi TaskFlow Support,

One of our team members (john@startup.io) left the company last week. I'm the account admin and I've deactivated his account, but he can still access our projects. This is a security concern as he still has access to confidential client information.

Please help ASAP.

Jennifer Lopez
CEO, StartupCo
Hola! Can I use TaskFlow in Spanish? I don't see language settings

subject: Feature request - time tracking
message: Does TaskFlow have built-in time tracking? We need to track billable hours for client projects. If not, are there plans to add this feature?

subject: API rate limit exceeded
message:
Our integration is hitting the API rate limit (1000 requests/hour on Pro plan). We're syncing data from our internal systems and need higher limits. What are our options?

Current usage: ~1500 requests/hour
Plan: Pro ($12/user/month, 25 users)

Thanks,
Michael
Can't login! Says my password is wrong but I'm 100% sure it's correct. Tried reset but no email received 😞

subject: Thank you!
message:
Just wanted to say thanks to whoever helped me yesterday with the Slack integration issue. It's working perfectly now and our team is much happier. Great support!

Alex

subject: Automation rules not triggering
message: I created an automation rule: When task moves to 'Done' → Add comment 'Completed!' and notify assignee. But it's not working. I've tested it multiple times. The rule shows as active in settings.
Do you offer student discounts? I'm using TaskFlow for my university group projects

subject: Competitor comparison
message:
Hi,

We're evaluating TaskFlow vs Asana and Monday.com. Can you provide a feature comparison and explain why TaskFlow is better?

Daniel

subject: Mobile app offline mode
message: Does the mobile app work offline? I travel frequently and need to access tasks without internet. The docs mention offline mode but I can't figure out how to enable it.
Your service is terrible! I've been waiting 3 days for a response to my billing issue. I want a full refund and to cancel my account.

subject: GitHub integration setup
message:
Hello,

I'm trying to set up the GitHub integration but getting an error: 'Failed to install GitHub App'. I've tried multiple times with different repositories. Our GitHub organization is 'acme-consulting'.

Can you help?

Olivia

subject: Bulk task import
message: We have 500+ tasks in an Excel spreadsheet that we need to import into TaskFlow. Is there a bulk import feature? I don't want to create them manually.
Hi! How do I add subtasks? Can't find the option in the mobile app

subject: Invoice request
message:
Hi,

I need an invoice for our January payment ($288 for Business plan, 12 users). Our accounting department requires invoices with our company details:

Clark Marketing Agency LLC
123 Main Street
New York, NY 10001
Tax ID: 12-3456789

Please send to accounting@marketingagency.com

Thanks!
The app is so slow today! Takes forever to load projects. Is there an outage?

subject: Custom fields feature
message: Can I create custom fields for tasks? We need to track 'Client Name' and 'Project Budget' for each task. I don't see this option in the task properties.

subject: SSO setup assistance
message:
We're on the Business plan and need help setting up SSO with our Azure AD. I've followed the documentation but getting authentication errors. Can someone from your team help us configure this?

We have 50 users waiting to onboard.

Brian Taylor
IT Director
Just upgraded to Pro! 🎉 Quick question - where do I find the advanced reporting features?

subject: Data export for GDPR request
message:
One of our users has submitted a GDPR data export request. How do we export all data associated with a specific user account (tasks created, comments, attachments, etc.)?

User email: former-employee@startup.io

Chris

subject: Task dependencies not showing
message: I've set up task dependencies (Task A blocks Task B) but they're not showing in the Timeline view. The dependency links are visible in the task details but not on the Gantt chart. Bug?
Can I change my email address? Moving to a new company but want to keep my personal TaskFlow account

subject: Downgrade to Free plan
message:
Hi,

We'd like to downgrade from Pro to Free plan. Our team has shrunk from 10 to 4 people and we don't need the advanced features anymore. How do we downgrade? Will we lose any data?

Laura
Love TaskFlow but wish you had a dark mode! Any plans to add it? 🌙

subject: Webhook configuration
message: I'm trying to set up webhooks to send task updates to our internal system. The webhook is configured but I'm not receiving any events. Endpoint: https://api.consultingfirm.com/taskflow-webhook. Can you help debug?

subject: File storage limit
message:
We're getting a warning that we're approaching our file storage limit (80% used). We're on the Pro plan. What's the storage limit and how much does additional storage cost?

Victoria
How do I delete a project? Can't find the delete button anywhere

subject: Security questionnaire
message:
Our security team requires vendors to complete a security questionnaire before we can use your service. It covers data encryption, access controls, compliance certifications, etc. Can you provide this?

Jason White
CISO, TechStartup Inc.

subject: Email notifications too frequent
message: I'm getting way too many email notifications from TaskFlow (50+ per day). I want to stay updated but this is overwhelming. How can I customize notification frequency? I'd prefer a daily digest.
Can multiple people be assigned to the same task? Or only one assignee?

subject: API documentation unclear
message:
The API documentation for creating tasks with attachments is unclear. The example shows a multipart/form-data request but doesn't explain how to structure it properly. Can you provide a complete example with code?

Language: Python

Thanks,
Thomas
Your competitor offers unlimited projects on their free plan. Why do you limit to 3 projects?

subject: Calendar view not loading
message: The Calendar view is stuck on a loading spinner and never loads. Other views (Kanban, List, Timeline) work fine. I've tried different browsers (Chrome, Firefox) and cleared cache. Still not working.

subject: Guest access permissions
message:
We want to give our clients view-only access to specific projects. I've added them as Guests but they can still edit tasks. How do I restrict them to view-only?

Nicole
Just recommended TaskFlow to 3 other companies! 🚀 Do you have a referral program?

subject: Legal terms review
message:
Our legal team needs to review your Terms of Service and Data Processing Agreement before we can proceed with the Enterprise plan. Can you provide the latest versions and indicate if you're open to negotiating custom terms?

Samantha Lee
General Counsel

subject: Mobile app battery drain
message: The TaskFlow iOS app is draining my battery like crazy. It's using 40% of my battery even when I'm not actively using it. iPhone 14, iOS 17.2. Please fix this!
Can I use TaskFlow for personal projects or is it only for teams?

subject: Data residency requirements
message:
We're a European company with strict data residency requirements. All customer data must be stored in EU data centers. Does TaskFlow support EU data residency? If so, how do we enable it?

William Anderson
Compliance Officer
The keyboard shortcuts are amazing! ⌨️ Is there a printable cheat sheet?

subject: Duplicate tasks appearing
message: I'm seeing duplicate tasks in my projects. When I create a task, it appears twice. When I delete one, both disappear. This started happening yesterday after the latest update.

subject: Migration from Asana
message:
We're planning to migrate from Asana to TaskFlow. We have 200+ projects and 5000+ tasks. Do you offer migration assistance? What's the process and timeline?

Andrew
How do I archive completed projects? My project list is getting too long

subject: Urgent: Account locked
message:
My account has been locked due to 'suspicious activity'. I haven't done anything unusual - just logged in from a coffee shop while traveling. I need access immediately as I have a client presentation in 2 hours.

Please unlock my account ASAP!

Elizabeth

subject: Template library
message: Do you have pre-built project templates? We run similar projects repeatedly (website launches, marketing campaigns) and would love to use templates instead of recreating the structure each time.
Does TaskFlow integrate with Microsoft Teams? We use Teams for all our communication

subject: Performance issues with large projects
message:
We have a project with 2000+ tasks and the app becomes very slow when loading it. Page load takes 15-20 seconds and scrolling is laggy. Is there a recommended limit for tasks per project?

Matthew
